_comment: CIS Microsoft Windows 10 Enterprise Benchmark v4.0.0 - Security baseline for hardened workstations.

securityPolicy._comment: Applied via secedit export/import for full CIS password & account lockout coverage

registry.name: AddPrinterDrivers
registry.description: Prevent users from installing printer drivers

registry.name: DontDisplayLastUserName
registry.description: Do not display last signed-in user

registry.name: LegalNoticeText
registry.desiredValue: This system is for authorized use only. By using this system you consent to monitoring.

registry.name: ScRemoveOption
registry.description: Smart card removal action: Lock Workstation

registry.name: RequireSecuritySignature
registry.description: MS network client: Digitally sign communications (always)

registry.name: RequireSecuritySignature
registry.description: MS network server: Digitally sign communications (always)

registry.name: EnableSecuritySignature
registry.description: MS network server: Digitally sign communications (if client agrees)

registry.name: DisableDomainCreds
registry.description: Do not store credentials for network auth

registry.name: UseMachineId
registry.description: Allow Local System computer identity for NTLM

registry.name: LmCompatibilityLevel
registry.description: LAN Manager auth level: NTLMv2 only, refuse LM and NTLM

registry.name: FilterAdministratorToken
registry.description: UAC Admin Approval Mode for Built-in Admin

registry.name: ConsentPromptBehaviorAdmin
registry.description: UAC: Prompt for consent on secure desktop

registry.name: ConsentPromptBehaviorUser
registry.description: UAC: Auto deny elevation for standard users

registry.name: LogFileSize
registry.description: Domain FW: Log file size 16384 KB

registry.name: LogFileSize
registry.description: Private FW: Log file size 16384 KB

registry.name: AllowLocalPolicyMerge
registry.description: Public FW: No local firewall rules

registry.name: AllowLocalIPsecPolicyMerge
registry.description: Public FW: No local IPsec rules

registry.name: LogFileSize
registry.description: Public FW: Log file size 16384 KB

registry.name: fBlockNonDomain
registry.description: Block non-domain networks when domain connected

registry.name: RegisterSpoolerRemoteRpcEndPoint
registry.description: Print Spooler: No remote client connections

registry.name: CopyFilesPolicy
registry.description: Limit queue files to color profiles

registry.name: UpdatePromptSettings
registry.description: Point and Print: Show warning and elevation prompt

registry.name: NoWarningNoElevationOnInstall
registry.description: Point and Print: Do not suppress warning

registry.name: ProcessCreationIncludeCmdLine_Enabled
registry.description: Include command line in process creation events

registry.name: RequirePlatformSecurityFeatures
registry.description: VBS: Secure Boot and DMA Protection

registry.name: HVCIMATRequired
registry.description: VBS: Require UEFI Memory Attributes Table

registry.name: LsaCfgFlags
registry.description: VBS: Credential Guard with UEFI lock

registry.name: DenyDeviceIDs
registry.description: Prevent device install by Device IDs

registry.name: DenyDeviceClasses
registry.description: Prevent device install by setup classes

registry.name: NoBackgroundPolicy
registry.description: Registry GP: Always process in background

registry.name: NoGPOListChanges
registry.description: Registry GP: Process even if unchanged

registry.name: NoBackgroundPolicy
registry.description: Security GP: Always process in background

registry.name: NoGPOListChanges
registry.description: Security GP: Process even if unchanged

registry.name: EnableCdp
registry.description: Disable Continue experiences on this device

registry.name: NoUseStoreOpenWith
registry.description: Turn off access to the Store

registry.name: DisableWebPnPDownload
registry.description: Disable downloading print drivers over HTTP

registry.name: NoWebServices
registry.description: Disable Internet download for Web publishing

registry.name: DeviceEnumerationPolicy
registry.description: DMA: Block all when external DMA protection

registry.name: PostAuthenticationActions
registry.description: LAPS: Post-auth reset password and logoff

registry.name: AllowCustomSSPsAPs
registry.description: Disallow custom SSPs and APs in LSASS

registry.name: BlockUserInputMethodsForSignIn
registry.description: Disallow copying user input methods to system

registry.name: DontDisplayNetworkSelectionUI
registry.description: Do not display network selection UI

registry.name: DontEnumerateConnectedUsers
registry.description: Do not enumerate connected users on domain PCs

registry.name: DisableLockScreenAppNotifications
registry.description: Turn off app notifications on lock screen

registry.name: ACSettingIndex
registry.description: Disable network in connected standby (plugged in)

registry.name: EnableAuthEpResolution
registry.description: Enable RPC Endpoint Mapper Client Auth

registry.name: LetAppsActivateWithVoiceAboveLock
registry.description: Force deny voice activation above lock

registry.name: MSAOptional
registry.description: Allow Microsoft accounts to be optional

registry.name: BlockHostedAppAccessWinRT
registry.description: Block UWP apps with WinRT from hosted content

registry.name: NoAutorun
registry.description: AutoRun default: Do not execute commands

registry.name: DisablePasswordReveal
registry.description: Do not display password reveal button

registry.name: NoLocalPasswordResetQuestions
registry.description: Prevent local password reset security questions

registry.name: AllowBuildPreview
registry.description: Disable user control over Insider builds

registry.name: D4F940AB-401B-4EFC-AADC-AD5F3C50688A
registry.description: ASR: Block Office creating executable content

registry.path: HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender\Windows Defender Exploit Guard\Network Protection
registry.name: EnableNetworkProtection
AllowCameraMicrophoneRedirection
registry.description: Application Guard: Block camera and mic

registry.name: SaveFilesToHost
registry.description: Application Guard: Block save files to host

registry.name: DisablePasswordSaving
registry.description: RDP: Do not allow passwords to be saved

registry.name: fDisablePNPRedir
registry.description: RDP: Disable Plug and Play redirection

registry.name: NoGenTicket
registry.description: Disable KMS Client Online AVS Validation

registry.name: DisableStoreApps
registry.description: Disable all apps from Microsoft Store

registry.name: DisableOSUpgrade
registry.description: Disable offer to update to latest Windows

registry.name: AllowSuggestedAppsInWindowsInkWorkspace
registry.description: Disable suggested apps in Ink Workspace

registry.name: DisallowExploitProtectionOverride

registry.description: BitLocker fixed: Allow data recovery agent

registry.description: BitLocker OS: Allow Secure Boot for integrity

registry.description: BitLocker OS: Require additional auth at startup

registry.description: BitLocker removable: No required AD backup

registry.name: DisableExternalDMAUnderLock
registry.description: BitLocker: Disable external DMA under lock

registry.name: FDVDiscoveryVolumeType
registry.description: BitLocker fixed: Discovery volume type none

registry.name: RDVDiscoveryVolumeType
registry.description: BitLocker removable: Discovery volume type none

registry.description: Windows Update must not be disabled

registry.description: Auto admin logon must be disabled
